faq.title: Got questions? We’ve got answers ready

items.question: What exactly is Mohajon?
items.answer: Mohajon is a comprehensive SaaS platform that helps F-commerce and E-commerce sellers manage their storefronts, Facebook & Instagram orders, inventory, and accounting all from a single unified dashboard.

items.question: Do I need coding skills to create my storefront?
items.answer: Not at all! Mohajon auto-generates a fully functional, mobile-responsive storefront for you. You don't need any technical knowledge to get started, and you can map your own custom domain easily.

items.question: How does the AI Messenger Chatbot work?
items.answer: Our AI agent connects directly to your Facebook page. It can reply to comments, search your product catalog, answer customer questions in Bengali, prepare draft orders, and even send invoice payment links—running 24/7.

items.question: Is Mohajon suitable if I only sell on Facebook?
items.answer: Absolutely. We have deep integration with Facebook. You can manage all your Messenger chats, auto-sync products to your Facebook Catalog, and process orders without ever needing a traditional website if you don't want one.

items.question: How does pricing and payment work?
items.answer: We offer multiple tiers starting with a Free plan. As your business grows, you can upgrade to unlock advanced features like AI chatbots, custom domains, and lower transaction fees. We integrate with local gateways like bKash and Steadfast for logistics.

cta.title: Innovative solutions for bold brands
cta.description: Looking to elevate your brand? We craft immersive experiences that captivate, engage, and make your business unforgettable in every interaction.
